caption: A video presents a split-screen view showing a spreadsheet on the left and a recording of a man on the right. The man wears a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap, and glasses, standing in a room filled with sports memorabilia and card supplies. Above him, a banner reads "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.com" alongside a logo featuring a red and blue stylized "J". The spreadsheet contains a long list of names and baseball teams, such as "David Cheng" and "LOS ANGELES DODGERS." A red subscription banner at the bottom of the video feed reads "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" and includes a red "Subscribe" button. Across the frames, the scene remains mostly static, with the man maintaining his position and the spreadsheet visible, while a white mouse cursor moves slightly across the screen, indicating navigation through the document.
